# Image placeholders

The site references images under this folder so real photos can be dropped in later without changing component code.

Main paths:

- `riri-hero.jpg`
- `riri-portrait.jpg`
- `riri-zine-01.jpg` through `riri-zine-04.jpg`
- `showroom-card.jpg`

Gallery paths:

- `gallery/riri-01.jpg` through `gallery/riri-12.jpg`

The current gallery can also display selected Google Drive photos directly.
If you want to make the site fully independent later, download those selected
photos and replace the Drive URLs in `src/data/photos.ts` with the local paths
above.

Event paths:

- `event-yofukashi-campus.jpg`
- `event-theoridea.jpg`
- `event-aitoki.jpg`
- `event-birthday.jpg`
- `event-fukurow-fm.jpg`
- `event-tvk.jpg`
- `event-imacampus.jpg`
- `event-steenz.jpg`
- `event-kyanly.jpg`

Avatar paths:

- `avatar-obake-riritan.png`
- `avatar-kinguriri.png`
- `avatar-chibiriri.png`
- `avatar-toriri.png`
- `avatar-ririwan.png`
- `avatar-komoriri.png`
- `avatar-himawariri.png`
- `avatar-natsuriri.png`
- `avatar-surfing.png`
